title: Gauge Impact Calculator
hero: See how your project grows (or shrinks) when your gauge changes — even by a little.
description:
This tool shows how much your project can grow or shrink when your gauge shifts - even by half a stitch.

Enter two gauges and instantly see the width difference across a range of stitch counts.

It’s a quick way to understand the real-world impact of gauge on sweaters, blankets, and any project.
excerpt: A tiny change in gauge can make a big difference. Compare two gauges side by side and see how the same stitch count can dramatically change the width of your project. 123
whyUseThisTool: Even a tiny gauge change can make a project grow or shrink. This tool shows you the real-world impact so you can adjust before you knit — not after.
metaTitle: Gauge Impact Calculator | How Gauge Changes Affect Width
metaDescription: See how different gauges change the finished width of your knitting. Compare two gauges side by side and instantly view the impact across multiple stitch counts. Perfect for understanding how even a small gauge shift can add — or subtract — inches from your project.
